_comment: Template documenting the JSON Claude returns from /health-review (narrowed 2026-05-26). Per-decision trade scoring + model_status moved out: see comms/schema/performance_review_response.template.json and comms/schema/ml_review_response.template.json. This skill covers TECHNICAL/PIPELINE/DATA health only. This file is documentation, not a validated JSON Schema.

sizing.note: qty within per-account pos_size cap; no absurd leverage

db_integrity.note: integrity_check not fetched (relay can't run PRAGMA); graded from journal recency + counts

data_validity.note: values sane: no negative sizes, no null required fields, monotonic timestamps, pnl reconciles

trainer_service.note: service health only; model/dataset detail in /ml-review

health_snapshot.note: cron health-snapshot generator state; cross-checked against own diag pulls

security.note: MANDATORY breach-detection sweep since last review; concern => operator_attention_required. Detail in security_check.

security_check._comment: MANDATORY breach-detection result (§ Security-breach check). status mirrors findings.security. A clean sweep MUST be a stated negative, not an omission: signals empty + an explicit clean note. Deep code/dependency review is /security-review, not here.
security_check.note: e.g. 'no breach detected since <window>: 0 secret-scanning alerts, 0 external actors, no workflow/secret/collaborator changes, auth log clean'

soak_decisions_due._comment: SURFACE, don't decide (§ Soak decisions due). One entry per soak that reached its promotion/demotion gate this window. The recommendation itself belongs to owner_skill.
soak_decisions_due.what: <model_id or strategy name or observe-only soak>
soak_decisions_due.gate_met: <the threshold reached, e.g. '14d shadow + 300 preds, drift stable' | 'M7 badge=PROMOTE' | 'exit-ladder rowcount bar'>

new_work_compliance._comment: MANDATORY audit of everything BUILT since the last review against the canonical ruleset (§ New-work compliance audit). Change-driven, distinct from the static weekday compliance_audit rotation. A clean sweep MUST be a stated negative: findings [] + an explicit note. A Tier-2/3 change merged without the required operator approval, a new default-off *_ENABLED gate over a required capability, an auto-flip/mode-toggle, a false 'verified' claim, or a skill-first/precedent violation is a concern => operator_attention_required.
new_work_compliance.note: e.g. '9 PRs + 0 direct commits audited since <window>, all tier-appropriate + rule-compliant'

anomalies: free-form list of notable items the reviewer flagged

backlog_drain._comment: HARD GATE (§ Draining the backlog): ONE entry per OPEN item — the array length MUST equal backlog_coverage.open_at_start. Triaging a sample is a review failure. action: resolved | fixed_now | invalid | kept_open.
backlog_drain.note: <= 160 chars — re-validation result + disposition; for kept_open, the current blocker (Tier-2/3 code / operator decision / soak)

backlog_coverage._comment: The completion gate. triaged MUST equal open_at_start; count_untriaged MUST be 0. A review with count_untriaged > 0 is INCOMPLETE — do not post the ping or report it done.

sprint_doc_review._comment: Recent sprint logs reviewed for doc correctness/clarity since the last review. severity: nit | drift | contradiction. Contradictions against canonical docs are fixed in-place or logged to the backlog.

claude_channel_ping._comment: The one-line update posted to @claude_ict_comms_bot via the send-ping system-action. Recorded here so the response is self-contained.
